hero.p: From Our Fields to Your Table. Premium Ghanaian Pineapples grown with passion and handpicked at peak ripeness, our pineapples deliver unmatched sweetness and quality. Whether you're a local processor, distributor, or international buyer, trust us for a reliable supply of fresh, flavorful fruit.
harvest.label: In season
harvest.detail: Sugarloaf available now. Typical lead time 2 weeks.
trust.label: Supplying premium fresh-cut partners
story.title: OUR STORY
story.history.title: FARM HISTORY
story.history.body: Established in 2020, we've grown from a small family farm to a leading pineapple producer in Ghana.
story.size.title: FARM SIZE
story.size.body: Spanning fertile land in Ghana's tropical region, optimized for premium pineapple cultivation.
story.prod.title: ANNUAL PRODUCTION
story.prod.body: Annual production is tailored to clients, scaling with the tonnage they need each year.
story.community.title: COMMUNITY
story.community.body: Employing over 20 local workers with fair wages and benefits.
story.shares.title: SHARES
story.shares.body: Investors who buy shares receive a 40% profit return at the end of the year, proportional to investment.
quote.body: We built 996 to prove Ghanaian fruit can compete globally, not on price, but on consistency.
why.title: WHY CHOOSE 996 FARMS?
why.quality.title: UNMATCHED QUALITY
why.quality.li1: Grown in nutrient-rich soil under optimal tropical conditions in Ghana.
why.quality.li2: Carefully selected varieties for natural sweetness and high juice content.
why.quality.li3: Hand-harvested at peak ripeness to preserve flavor and texture.
why.quality.li4: Strict post-harvest handling to avoid bruising and contamination.
why.quality.li5: Regular quality control audits to meet both local and international standards.
why.scale.title: RELIABLE & SCALABLE SUPPLY
why.scale.li2: Structured harvesting schedule for consistent delivery.
why.scale.li3: Dedicated team managing logistics for local and export markets.
why.scale.li4: Partnerships with local processors and supply hubs like Blue Skies.
why.scale.li5: Ready to scale for international exports with appropriate certifications.
why.eco.title: SUSTAINABLE & ETHICAL FARMING
why.eco.li1: Eco-friendly farming practices that protect soil health and biodiversity.
why.eco.li2: Minimal chemical usage with natural pest control techniques.
why.eco.li3: Employment and training opportunities for local communities.
why.eco.li4: Water-efficient irrigation systems and crop rotation methods.
why.eco.li5: Transparent operations aligned with global agricultural sustainability goals.
why.pro.title: PROFESSIONAL STANDARDS
why.pro.li1: Responsive customer service and business communication.
why.pro.li5: Available for B2B contracts and long-term supply agreements.
why.trust.title: TRUSTED BY INDUSTRY PARTNERS
why.trust.li1: Currently supplying to reputable local companies such as Blue Skies.
why.trust.li2: Positive feedback on taste, consistency, and delivery timelines.
why.trust.li3: Built a reputation for reliability and responsiveness.
why.trust.li4: Actively forming partnerships with international buyers.
why.trust.li5: Ready to meet volume, quality, and certification demands for global trade.
process.title: OUR FARM PROCESS
process.sub: From planting to harvest, we follow meticulous processes to ensure the highest quality pineapples.
process.v1.title: Land Preparation
process.v1.body: See how we prepare our fields with optimal soil conditions for pineapple cultivation.
process.v2.title: Planting Process
process.v2.body: Our careful planting techniques ensure healthy growth from the very beginning.
process.v3.title: Cultivation Care
process.v3.body: How we nurture our pineapple plants during the growth cycle.
process.v4.title: Harvesting Techniques
process.v4.body: Watch our skilled workers hand-pick pineapples at peak ripeness.
process.v5.title: Packaging & Delivery
process.v5.body: Our pineapples are carefully prepared and delivered fresh to trusted local partners like Blue Skies, maintaining the highest quality from farm to destination.
products.title: OUR PRODUCTS
products.p1.title: Premium Sugarloaf
products.p1.body: Our signature variety, prized for golden flesh, high sugar content, and low acidity.
products.p2.title: Bulk & Export-Ready
products.p2.body: Available fresh, with options for bulk wholesale, export-grade packaging, or processing.
products.p3.title: Year-Round Supply
products.p3.body: Flexible order quantities and a 12-month cultivation cycle to fit your business needs.
products.p4.title: Custom Cutting
products.p4.body: Custom-cut and packaging services on request for processors and retail partners.
catalog.title: OUR PINEAPPLE CATALOG
catalog.subtitle: Explore the finest selections of fresh pineapples straight from our fields.
quote.heading: Get a quick estimate
quote.sub: Adjust the values to get an indicative lead time and price band. Final terms confirmed by quote.
quote.disclaimer: Estimates only. Real pricing depends on certifications, packaging, season, and freight. Hit "Lock this in" for an exact quote.
cat.f.name: Golden Ripe
cat.f.blurb: Our signature variety. Honeyed sweetness, low acidity, pale-gold flesh, picked at peak ripeness for fresh markets and premium export.
cat.s1.name: Juicy & Mellow
cat.s1.blurb: Lower acidity, abundant juice. Preferred by processors and canneries.
cat.s2.name: Field-Fresh Bunch
cat.s2.blurb: Bulk crates ready for processing, retail distribution, or contract supply.
cat.s3.name: Premium Selection
cat.s3.blurb: Hand-graded for international shipment with uniform size, peak sweetness, and export-ready packaging.
contact.title: CONTACT US
contact.intro: Interested in our premium pineapples? Whether you're a local market, international buyer, or processing company, we can provide the quality and quantity you require.
